name: spec-toolkit
description: Spec toolkit — agent-portable, key-free GENERATE-layer skills that expand a sparse seed into a high-recall, verification-ready spec draft and adversarially critique it for omissions. Ships spec-expansion (seed → objects/CTAs → state machines → path×edge matrix → candidate scenarios, all provenance-tagged) and completeness-critic (loop-until-dry multi-lens omission hunt that emits its own blind spots). Writes the OpenSpec change-folder shape (proposal.md + specs/ delta) plus additive richness sections, consumed downstream by code-toolkit's VERIFY layer.
